title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and server for running large language models locally; supports Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and others with a simple pull/run workflow.

title: ollama-python
summary: First-party Python client and async wrapper for the Ollama HTTP API; installable via PyPI.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; published on npm as ‘ollama’.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package exposing Ollama models as LLM and embeddings components.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI (formerly Ollama WebUI) that talks to the local Ollama API; no backend code required.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client library for Ollama providing synchronous & asynchronous APIs.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem wrapping the Ollama REST API with active-model-style convenience methods.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community-built interactive CLI with conversation memory, prompt templates, and shell integrations.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental GitHub Copilot plugin that routes code-completion requests to a local Ollama model.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart for deploying Ollama server and models on Kubernetes clusters.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Lightweight Alpine-based Docker image with Ollama pre-installed and multi-arch support.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset-ai letting you use Ollama models as generators or embedders.

title: ollama-sdks
summary: Meta-repository tracking community SDKs for Go, Rust, C#, Swift and more.

title: ollama-gpt4all-ui
summary: GPT4All-compatible UI that can switch between Ollama and GPT4All backends.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Discord bot that streams Ollama model responses into guild channels using slash commands.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit chat app that connects to Ollama and exposes model-selection, temperature, and system prompts.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: Official n8n community node to invoke Ollama models inside automation workflows.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds a command to summarize or continue writing notes using a local Ollama model.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate providing strongly-typed async bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET SDK for Ollama with dependency-injection helpers and minimal API examples.
